# Sword-sheath

> [!danger] ⚔️ Attachment · Cost: **0** · Tactics

*Item. Gift.*

---

Attach to a (Tactics) hero. Limit 1 per hero.
**Response**: After attached hero destroys an enemy engaged with you, exhaust Sword-sheath and a **_Weapon_** attachment on the attached hero to draw 1 card.

---

> *“The blade that is drawn from this sheath shall not be stained or broken even in defeat.” —Galadriel, The Fellowship of the Ring*
